title: Amazing Vanilla+
description: It's for those who want to start their 2 week phase (or just want to continue their existing one) with a refreshing twist in mind
body:
This is a vanilla plus modpack, suitable for both new players who just want to try out some mods and returning players who want to make this already amazing game even better. If you have a potato PC, don't worry because this modpack has you covered with some of the greatest mods 
for optimization. The other mods are there to make your playtrough refreshing, more enjoyable and even more beautiful. 

We are planning to make our modpack for the newer Minecraft versions too, once all the mods are released for that update, so if we don't upload a new updated pack, it's probably because the mods that we use are still under development by our fellow creators.

New versions are on the way for you to play, just a few more mods and they should be ready. Newer updates may include some new mods in the future, but our aim is to use the same ones in each update

If you have any questions or suggestions for the pack, feel free to join the official Discord server of this pack.

For every 100 downloads we'll donate 1% of the revenue to the local charity to support those in need.
